hyperedges.label: Koin DI Initialization at App Startup
Sketch Local Persistence Pattern (Entity + DAO + Serializers)

nodes.label: KMP (Kotlin Multiplatform) Readiness
nodes.rationale: Architecture is designed to be easily migrable to Compose Multiplatform, keeping platform-specific code isolated and maintaining a clean separation between business logic and platform concerns.

nodes.label: Stroke Size Preview Bubble Implementation Plan
nodes.norm_label: stroke size preview bubble implementation plan

nodes.label: Stroke Size Preview Bubble Design Spec
nodes.norm_label: stroke size preview bubble design spec

nodes.label: Thumb Position Calculation
nodes.rationale: Material 3 Slider reserves ~10dp of horizontal padding at each edge for the thumb; effective track width is maxWidth - 2*10dp. Thumb X = thumbPaddingPx + fraction * trackWidth. Bubble offset y fixed at -72dp (56dp content height + 16dp gap) to avoid needing measurement before placement.

nodes.label: Fade-Only Bubble Animation
nodes.rationale: AnimatedVisibility with fadeIn/fadeOut(tween(150)) only — no slide — to keep the transition unobtrusive.

nodes.label: Fractional Crop Rect (0-1 normalized)
nodes.rationale: CropRect stores fractions (0-1) of image dimensions rather than absolute pixels to keep the crop state coordinate-system agnostic, decoupling display resolution from the actual crop calculation.

nodes.label: Minimum 50x50px Crop Enforcement
nodes.rationale: Minimum 50x50px matches existing canvas minimum image size in DrawingViewModel.resizeImage, ensuring consistency across the image pipeline.

nodes.label: Dispatchers.IO for Bitmap Processing
nodes.rationale: confirmCrop runs on Dispatchers.IO to avoid blocking the main thread during bitmap decoding and file write operations.

nodes.label: SketchApp Launcher Icon (mdpi)
nodes.description: Android app launcher icon at mdpi density. Displays a stylized Android robot figure (green) centered on a rounded-square light green background. The icon represents the SketchApp Android application and follows standard Android adaptive icon conventions. The green robot silhouette is the default Android stock launcher icon shape, suggesting the app may be using a default or placeholder launcher icon at this density.

nodes.label: Green Android Robot on Light Green Background
nodes.description: Visual design element: rounded-square icon shape with a light green (#C8E6C9 approximate) background and a darker green Android robot figure centered within. Standard Android mdpi resolution (48x48dp). Represents the default Android placeholder/stock launcher icon appearance.
nodes.norm_label: green android robot on light green background

nodes.label: ic_launcher_round (mdpi) — Round app launcher icon featuring the Android robot mascot (green droid head) centered on a circular green gradient background with a subtle drop shadow. The icon uses the standard Android adaptive icon round shape with Material Design styling.
nodes.norm_label: ic_launcher_round (mdpi) — round app launcher icon featuring the android robot mascot (green droid head) centered on a circular green gradient background with a subtle drop shadow. the icon uses the standard android adaptive icon round shape with material design styling.

nodes.label: Green square background with rounded corners and grid lines, featuring the standard Android robot (droid) mascot in white/light color centered on the icon, representing an Android application launcher icon
nodes.norm_label: green square background with rounded corners and grid lines, featuring the standard android robot (droid) mascot in white/light color centered on the icon, representing an android application launcher icon

nodes.label: Icon color palette: medium green background (#4CAF50 range), white Android robot silhouette, subtle drop shadow on the square tile, light grid overlay suggesting a sketch/graph paper motif

nodes.label: ic_launcher_round (xhdpi) — Round app launcher icon: white Android robot silhouette centered on a medium green (#4CAF50-style) circular background with a subtle grid/crosshatch pattern overlay. Represents the SketchApp Android application icon in round format at xhdpi density (96×96dp equivalent).
nodes.norm_label: ic_launcher_round (xhdpi) — round app launcher icon: white android robot silhouette centered on a medium green (#4caf50-style) circular background with a subtle grid/crosshatch pattern overlay. represents the sketchapp android application icon in round format at xhdpi density (96×96dp equivalent).

nodes.label: SketchApp Launcher Icon (xxhdpi)
nodes.description: App launcher icon for SketchApp at xxhdpi density. Displays a standard Android robot/droid silhouette in white on a green grid-patterned background. The icon has a rounded square (squircle) shape typical of Android adaptive icons. The green background features a lighter grid overlay giving a graph-paper or canvas aesthetic, reinforcing the drawing/sketching theme of the app. A subtle drop shadow is cast by the Android figure. The overall design uses Material-style iconography with a mint/green color palette.

nodes.label: Icon Visual Design: Android Robot on Green Grid
nodes.description: Visual concept: white Android robot silhouette centered on a green (#4CAF50-range) background with a lighter grid/graph-paper pattern overlay. Rounded square shape. Represents an Android application icon following Material Design launcher icon guidelines.
nodes.norm_label: icon visual design: android robot on green grid

nodes.label: ic_launcher_round (xxhdpi) — Round app launcher icon: circular shape with a green tiled/grid background, white Android robot mascot (head with antennae) centered, flat material design style, drop shadow on the right side. Represents the SketchApp Android application icon at extra-extra-high density (xxhdpi).
nodes.norm_label: ic_launcher_round (xxhdpi) — round app launcher icon: circular shape with a green tiled/grid background, white android robot mascot (head with antennae) centered, flat material design style, drop shadow on the right side. represents the sketchapp android application icon at extra-extra-high density (xxhdpi).
